search_query: how to start a YouTube channel
retrieved_result: Die to yourself daily Die to yourself daily Not my will but Thy Will be done, Oh Lord. A self righteous man is one who assumes his will is God's Will. God's Will is not our will. His Ways are not our ways. His Desires are not our desires. It is never easy to die to self and take up the cross and follow God's Will. Jesus
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is religious exhortation about dying to self, not information or guidance on starting a YouTube channel.
